message:
feat(rich_rust): comprehensive updates across console, rendering, and tests

Core Modules:
- console.rs: Thread safety improvements and documentation
- interactive.rs: Enhanced interactive mode handling
- live.rs: Live display updates
- sync.rs: Mutex recovery refinements
- theme.rs: Theme system improvements
- group.rs: Group renderable enhancements

Demo Showcase:
- dashboard_scene.rs: Visual improvements

E2E Tests:
- e2e_combined.rs: Multi-feature integration tests
- e2e_export.rs: Export functionality tests
- e2e_interactive.rs: Interactive mode tests
- e2e_json_formatting.rs: JSON output tests
- e2e_markdown.rs: Markdown rendering tests
- e2e_markdown_rendering.rs: Additional markdown tests
- e2e_mutex_poison.rs: Panic recovery tests
- e2e_syntax.rs: Syntax highlighting tests

Fuzz Tests:
- fuzz_markup_parser.rs: Markup parser fuzzing
- fuzz_style_parser.rs: Style parser fuzzing

Property Tests:
- mutex_poison_recovery.rs: Recovery property tests
- property_tests.rs: General property tests
- terminal_detection_errors.rs: Error handling tests
- thread_safety.rs: Concurrent access tests

Sync beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
